build.//buildCommand: Three concerns: (1) `npm install` not `ci` because Railpack mounts /app/node_modules/.cache and ci EBUSYs that mount. (2) --legacy-peer-deps for lovable-tagger's React-18 peer-dep noise. (3) --include=dev because Railway sets NODE_ENV=production at the service level which makes `npm install` skip devDependencies — without it `vite` (the build tool itself) isn't on PATH and `npm run build` dies with 'sh: 1: vite: not found'.
build.//: watchPatterns are evaluated relative to the repo root. Limiting to HOA-MARKETING/** stops sibling-app changes from triggering a redeploy of this service.

deploy.//: Static Vite SPA served by `serve`. `-s` enables SPA fallback so client-side routes (e.g. /login) survive a hard refresh; the public/_redirects + vercel.json files cover other deploy targets, but serve needs the -s flag here.
